query:
SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME 
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'accounting_monthly_close';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45KYJfAwvASo98o.bfca2b77e1a0 --database ePrX25nq5sECZ3f72okXeB --execute SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME 
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'accounting_monthly_close';
stdout:
CONSTRAINT_NAME	TABLE_NAME	REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME
fk_1	accounting_monthly_close_audit	accounting_monthly_close
